zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibel De Belgrave於1375年出生在英國瓦維其可爾帕可哈爾時，她的父親Thomas Belgrave27歲，母親Joan de Pulford27歲。她於1412年與Ralph de Arden在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾帕可哈爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1440年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾比米加姆享年65歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibel De Belgrave于1375年出生在英国瓦維其可爾帕可哈爾时，她的父亲Thomas Belgrave27岁，母亲Joan de Pulford27岁。她于1412年与Ralph de Arden在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾帕可哈爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1440年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾比米加姆享年65岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Belgrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Leicestershire, recorded in Domesday Book as Merdegrave. The original name derived from Old English mearth ‘marten’ + grāf ‘grove’, but after the Norman Conquest the first element was taken to be Old French merde ‘dung, filth’, and changed to Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’, to remove the unpleasant association. A mid 12th-century writer refers to the place as ‘Merthegrave, nunc (now) Belegrava’.

nameMeanings.name: Sibel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sibel De Belgrave was born in 1375, in Parkhall, Warwickshire, England, her father, Thomas Belgrave, was 27 and her mother, Joan de Pulford, was 27. She married Ralph de Arden in 1412, in Parkhall, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1440, in Birmingham, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibel De Belgrave est née en 1375, à Parkhall, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Belgrave, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan de Pulford, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph de Arden en 1412, à Parkhall, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1440, à Birmingham, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibel De Belgrave 1375 in Parkhall, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Belgrave 27 und ihre Mutter Joan de Pulford 27. Sie hat 1412 in Parkhall, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Ralph de Arden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1440 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Birmingham, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sibel De Belgrave è nata il nel 1375 nel Parkhall, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Belgrave, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Joan de Pulford, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Ralph de Arden nel 1412, nel Parkhall, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1440, nel Birmingham, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibel De Belgraveが1375年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアパークハルで生まれた時，父Thomas Belgraveは27歳，母Joan de Pulfordは27歳であった。1412年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアパークハルでRalph de Ardenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1440年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアバーミンガムで65歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibel De Belgrave(이)가 1375년 영국 워윅실르 박홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Belgrave(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Pulford(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1412년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 박홀에서 Ralph de Arden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1440년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 비밍함에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibel De Belgrave nasceu em 1375, em Parkhall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Belgrave, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Pulford, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph de Arden em 1412, em Parkhall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1440, em Birmingham, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibel De Belgrave родилась в 1375 г. в местности пархолл, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Belgrave было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Pulford, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph de Arden в 1412 г. в местности пархолл, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1440 г. в местности бирмингхам, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sibel De Belgrave nació en 1375, en Parkhall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Belgrave, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Joan de Pulford, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Ralph de Arden en 1412, en Parkhall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1440, en Birmingham, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
